meta.title: Blog

fields.titlePlaceholder: E.g.: 2026 AFA transfer window: most-wanted free agents
fields.descriptionHint: Appears on Google and when sharing on social. Max 158 characters.
fields.descriptionPlaceholder: A clear summary of what readers will find.
fields.localeHint: The language you'll write this post in. It can't be changed later.
fields.tagsHint: 3–8 tags separated by commas. Min 2 characters each.
fields.heroHint: 1200×630 ideal. JPG/PNG/WebP/AVIF, max 5MB. Uploaded to our storage and auto-transcoded to AVIF.
fields.heroUploadError: The image could not be uploaded.
fields.heroUploadErrorRetry: The image could not be uploaded. Try again.
fields.contentHint: ≥1500 words. At least 3 H2 sections. Link ≥3 real portfolios from /[slug].
fields.contentPlaceholder: Start with a 2–3 paragraph intro that hooks the reader…

feedback.submitted: Submitted for review. We'll let you know when the admin approves it.
